_instructions: Copy this file, rename it STORY-NNN-validated.json, fill in every field. The agent cannot start without all required fields.
title: As a [user type], I want to [action] so that [benefit]

acceptance_criteria.then: describe the expected outcome — must be measurable

non_functional_requirements.performance: e.g. API responds in < 200ms at P95
non_functional_requirements.accessibility: e.g. form is fully keyboard accessible

definition_of_done: All acceptance criteria have passing tests
